reasoning: Patch derived from muruvetg/from-simulation-goals-to-parameters output for BPIC2017. Three suggestions were simulatable in Prosimos: (4) improve validation specialist utilization by adding resources to W_Validate application, (7) reduce compliance check duration via parallel processing, (3) reduce W_Complete application duration via template-based offer generation. Suggestions 1,2,5,6,8 involve business rules, automation, and tracking that have no Prosimos parameter equivalent.

modifications.proposed_value: 143.959 hours (20% reduction per suggestion 4: streamlined validation initiated immediately)
modifications.rationale: Suggestion 4 targets 80% utilization and streamlined validation. Reducing mean duration by 20% models faster processing when checks are initiated immediately upon submission.
modifications.evidence_source: Base repo suggestion 4: streamlined process where initial validation checks are initiated immediately upon application submission
modifications.feasibility_assumptions: Assumes process streamlining and template tools reduce manual effort by 20%
modifications.intervention: Reduce W_Validate application mean duration by 20%
modifications.mechanism_rationale: Shorter service time at the bottleneck activity reduces queue build-up and average waiting time

modifications.proposed_value: 175.573 hours (50% reduction per suggestion 7: parallel processing of checks)
modifications.rationale: Suggestion 7 explicitly targets a maximum of 48 hours for compliance checks via parallel processing. Halving the mean duration models the effect of parallelised affordability and identity checks.
modifications.evidence_source: Base repo suggestion 7: investigate effect of parallel processing of checks to expedite timeline without compromising thoroughness
modifications.feasibility_assumptions: Parallel processing is feasible where affordability and identity checks are independent
modifications.intervention: Reduce W_Assess potential fraud mean duration by 50% via parallel processing
modifications.mechanism_rationale: Parallelising independent sub-checks halves elapsed time at this compliance step

modifications.proposed_value: 20.785 hours (50% reduction per suggestion 3: template-based offer generation)
modifications.rationale: Suggestion 3 targets offer preparation within 24 hours via template-based tools. Halving the mean duration models faster offer completion.
modifications.evidence_source: Base repo suggestion 3: template-based offer generation tool that allows faster offer creation based on validated data
modifications.feasibility_assumptions: Template tooling reduces manual offer preparation effort by 50%
modifications.intervention: Reduce W_Complete application mean duration by 50% via template-based generation
modifications.mechanism_rationale: Faster offer preparation shortens the path from validation completion to offer availability

expected_kpi_impacts.reasoning: Reduced durations at W_Validate and W_Complete directly shorten the critical path

expected_kpi_impacts.kpi_name: Average Waiting Time Across All Activities
expected_kpi_impacts.reasoning: Shorter service times reduce queue build-up across the process
Direct duration reduction at W_Assess potential fraud

unresolved_kpis.explanation: Suggestion 4 targets utilization via flexible working hours and staffing adjustments but does not specify concrete resource count or calendar changes that can be directly encoded in Prosimos without additional assumptions

warnings: Suggestions 1 (processing time target), 2 (documentation reminder limit), 5 (customer communication timing), 6 (chasing leads frequency), and 8 (conversion rate tracking) describe business rules and KPI targets rather than Prosimos simulation parameters and cannot be encoded as scenario modifications.
Duration reductions are applied to representative resources per activity. All resources for each activity receive proportional reduction via the apply_patch merger.
